response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and a proven track record in open-source tooling and cross-platform development, but lacks clear evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this engineering productivity manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven ability to lead technical projects across mobile, web, and embedded platforms
Active contributor to open-source tooling and technical education (workshops, courses)
concerns: No explicit mention of people management or leading engineering teams
Lacks documented experience in roadmap planning or organizational change
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks clear career progression narrative
